front: What are the phases of clinical trials for peptide drugs?
back: Phase I: Safety, PK, MTD in healthy volunteers (20-80). Phase II: Efficacy, dose-finding in patients (100-300). Phase III: Confirmatory, large-scale efficacy/safety (1,000-5,000). Phase IV: Post-marketing surveillance. Special considerations for peptides: 1) First-in-human starting dose calculation (NOAEL), 2) Immunogenicity monitoring.
